purpose: Stage-two routing after v5 opinion recovery. Use the best adapter per legal mode under the corrected generation budget.

legal_opinion.reason: Best current answer-only quality and citation clarity on the opinion path with zero thought leakage.

legal_memo.reason: Best current memo structure and completion rate after the corrected-budget evaluation.

legal_analysis.reason: Best current analysis answer-only quality and citation clarity without structural regressions.

fallback.reason: Best general fallback if per-mode routing is unavailable.

notes: v5 is a successful opinion-specialist refinement, not the best single general adapter.
Keep the benchmark generation budget policy aligned with this routing decision.
All v4/v5 benchmark outputs in this decision were verified to have zero thought leakage.
